outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to positive total GEX pinning price near equilibrium
outlook.summary: Market makers are heavily long gamma, pinning the price exactly at the multi-expiry Gamma Flip. Expect suppressed volatility and a tight consolidation range. The 590 strike serves as a massive Call Wall and coincides with the Monthly Max Pain, acting as a strong upside magnet and resistance.

levels.motivazione: Gamma flip aligns precisely across all three expiries exactly at the spot price, creating a critical structural anchor and price pinning zone.
levels.sintesiOperativa: PIVOT: Price pinned at gamma equilibrium

levels.motivazione: Massive dominant Call Open Interest across all three expiries establishes the ultimate structural ceiling for the current setup.
Heavy Call concentration in 0DTE and MONTHLY, reinforced by the Monthly Max Pain level, creating a strong gravitational pull and resistance.
Significant Put support backed by extremely high 0DTE volume and massive MONTHLY Open Interest, defending the downside.
Deep structural hedge support visible in both WEEKLY and MONTHLY expirations, validating the bearish volatility smirk.
